column4: The wind howls at this narrow pass between two peaks. Snow whips horizontally. The path descends south toward greener lands.
column13: A rocky outcrop where massive eagles nest. Bones of large animals litter the ground. The view stretches for miles.

column4: Ancient trees block all sunlight. Mushrooms glow faintly on rotting logs. Something moves in the undergrowth.
column13: The rocky path winds downward through scrub brush. A stream trickles alongside.
column22: A break in the canopy lets sunlight through. Wildflowers carpet the ground. A stone circle stands in the center.
column31: A shallow cave with signs of habitation — a bedroll, dried herbs, a small fire pit.
column40: The trees thin here, revealing rolling hills to the west. Claw marks scar the bark.
column49: Two paths cross here. A wooden signpost points in four directions, but the writing has faded.

column58: A warm tavern with a roaring fire. The smell of ale and roasting meat fills the air.
column67: Bubbling vials and strange smells. The alchemist peers at you through thick spectacles.

column76: The western gate of the town. Less grand than the north gate, used mainly by farmers.
column85: Vendors sell vegetables, cloth, and pottery. A bard plays a lute on the corner.

column94: Weapon smiths and leather workers ply their trade here. The clang of metal rings out.
column103: A white stone temple with stained glass windows. Soft chanting echoes within.

column112: The southern edge of the square. A stocks stands here, currently empty.
column121: A rougher establishment. The clientele look like they'd stab you for a copper.

column148: A long hall of fallen columns. The ceiling has collapsed in places, letting in shafts of light.
column157: A circular chamber at the heart of the ruins. An altar stands in the center, stained dark.
